entities.name: CEPHALOSPORIUM STRIPE
entities.description: A vascular wilt disease of wheat caused by Cephalosporium gramineum

entities.name: CEPHALOSPORIUM GRAMINEUM
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes Cephalosporium stripe

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Triticum aestivum L., the crop affected by Cephalosporium stripe

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, negatively impacted by Cephalosporium stripe

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITY
entities.description: The physical and chemical properties of wheat grains, negatively impacted by Cephalosporium stripe

entities.name: CONSERVATION TILLAGE
entities.description: Agricultural practices that reduce soil disturbance, the adoption of which is limited by Cephalosporium stripe

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO CEPHALOSPORIUM STRIPE
entities.description: The ability of wheat cultivars to withstand or limit the impact of Cephalosporium stripe

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population of lines derived from a cross between two cultivars used for genetic mapping

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating plant resistance to disease under field conditions

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome

entities.name: WHITEHEADS
entities.description: Sterile heads in wheat caused by pathogen infection, used as a measure of disease severity

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of markers on a chromosome

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for constructing linkage maps

entities.name: DART MARKERS
entities.description: Diversity Arrays Technology markers used for constructing linkage maps

entities.name: QTL ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to link phenotypic traits to specific genomic regions

entities.name: BRUNDAGE
entities.description: A susceptible wheat cultivar used as a parent in the RIL population

entities.name: CODA
entities.description: A resistant wheat cultivar used as a parent in the RIL population

entities.name: REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to confirm the additivity of QTL effects
